name: BlockDoc
short_description: Block dock is a simple fighting type block breaking game. Let's destroy the enemy's block with items. Have fun at cheap prices
detailed_description:
Block dock is a simple fighting type block breaking game.
Block breaking × Air hockey was developed as a concept.
Let's tactically destroy enemy blocks using items

Item

There are currently three types of items.
Green item: Player or enemy will be longer
Blue Item: The reflection of the ball will be random
Orange Item: Ball speed will increase

Map

There are currently 4 types of maps. Enjoy a strategic game from simple maps of four types.

from now on

We will add rich effects and content to make it more enjoyable.
Moreover, it will evolve further according to your voice


Have fun at cheap prices
